name: careermitra-engineering-foundation
description: Machine-readable index of the CareerMitra engineering foundation: governance files, canonical modules, documentation taxonomy, conventions and ownership. Parsed by AI tools and automation to understand the repository.
principles: Trustworthy by default — accuracy and proof outrank delight; unverified data is never shipped.
Clarity over cleverness — plain language, one obvious next step, no dark patterns.
Mobile-first, low-friction — works on 3G; 16px min body; 44px touch targets.
A companion, not a form — reduce anxiety; surface deadlines; remember documents.
Accessible & multilingual — WCAG 2.1 AA; English, Hindi and regional scripts.
Consent and privacy are non-negotiable — never act on a citizen's behalf without explicit consent.

glossary.Opportunity: Any listing: government job, scholarship, internship, or apprenticeship.
glossary.Notification: The official published announcement an Opportunity is derived from.
glossary.Aspirant: An end-user pursuing a government career.
glossary.Journey: The aspirant's tracked set of opportunities, documents, dates and applications.
glossary.Eligibility: The rules (age, education, category, domicile) that gate an Opportunity.
glossary.Vault: The Document Vault — the aspirant's secure store of identity/education documents.
glossary.Ingestion: The pipeline that turns Notifications into verified canonical Opportunities.
glossary.VerificationGate: The step that blocks unverified data (dates/eligibility) from publish.
glossary.Grounding: Basing an AI answer strictly on verified data or cited official sources.

dataSensitivityLevels.pii: Aspirant personal data — encrypted, minimized, access-controlled.
dataSensitivityLevels.sensitive-pii: Identity/education documents & form data — highest protection, field-level encryption, full audit.
dataSensitivityLevels.secret: Keys, tokens, credentials — vault only, never in git or logs.

modules.name: Results
modules.purpose: Surface and track official exam results.

modules.name: Admit Cards
modules.purpose: Surface and retrieve official admit cards.

modules.name: Resume Parser
modules.purpose: Extract structured profile data from an uploaded resume.

modules.name: Document Vault
modules.purpose: Securely store identity and education documents.

modules.name: Application Tracker
modules.purpose: Track applications, stages and deadlines across opportunities.

modules.name: Eligibility Engine
modules.purpose: Evaluate an aspirant against an opportunity's eligibility rules; explainable and auditable.

modules.name: AI Career Assistant
modules.purpose: Answer questions and guide the journey, strictly grounded in verified data.

modules.name: Form Filling Service
modules.purpose: Assist filling official application forms from vault and profile data.

repositoryStructure.docs: Numbered documentation spine — single source of truth.
repositoryStructure.services: Backend services (per canonical module or domain).

hardConstraints: No unverified official data is shipped (deadlines/eligibility pass the verification gate).
AI guidance must be grounded; no fabricated official facts; no guaranteed outcomes.
No action on a citizen's behalf without explicit, recorded consent (esp. Form Filling).
No secrets or real PII in version control; no PII in logs.
Document Vault / Resume Parser / Form Filling / identity / ingestion changes require Security Review.
External government-portal credentials are never stored.
